acme-ai.name: Acme AI
acme-ai.description: Acme AI is an AI server that connects your tools to your data.
acme-ai.what_is_mcp: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard that enables AI assistants to securely connect to external data sources.
features: Natural language analytics - ask questions in plain English
Free unlimited usage - no subscription required
use_cases: Ask 'What's my best performing metric this week?' and get instant answers
acme-ai.positioning: The only AI server built specifically for your data.
